securityPrinciples.principle: Least privilege by default for tools filesystem network MCP and custom actions.
Policy decisions are explicit, auditable, and immutable once recorded.
Secrets never stored in plan or manifest payloads; only references and vault keys.
No unauthenticated remote runtime profile in production policy.

promptInjectionDefense.control: Pin system-level non-negotiables in every execution prompt.
Reject instruction overrides that conflict with policy constraints.
Require source attribution for externally introduced instructions and data.
Run pre-execution prompt safety lint for forbidden patterns.

riskRegister.mitigation: mandatory argument validation against tool schema and policy constraints
prompt lint plus non-negotiable pinning plus contradiction checks
profile-gated transport policy and trusted network boundary controls
